Off Calendar May-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Matthew Gluck, 415.510.2144 of Gluck Danile Atkinson, LLP appearing for Defendants.
Martin Eng, 415.246.1111 Defendant on his own behalf.

Martin Eng was not allowed to argue.

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOANNE ENG'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. Defendant did not show any undue prejudice. (Ramirez v. Sturdevant (1994) 21 Cal.App.4th 904, 915.). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
